theorem f (h : ∀ n, ∃ k, k ≥ n ∧ P k) : ∀ n, ∃ k ≥ n, P k := by
  intro n
  have h₁ : ∃ k, k ≥ n ∧ P k := h n
  obtain ⟨k, hk₁, hk₂⟩ := h₁
  exact ⟨k, hk₁, hk₂⟩
